model-provider.label: Model access
model-provider.desc: Save multiple model configurations and choose which one chats use.

character-card.label: Character card
character-card.desc: Manage personas, sticker sets, portraits, backgrounds, and default companion strategy.

memory.label: Memory
memory.desc: Control what characters can remember and what is never written to memory.

web-access.label: Web access
web-access.desc: Configure the Exa, Perplexity, and Gemini search providers and their API keys.

safety.label: Permissions
safety.desc: Configure file read/write, shell, network requests, and the confirmation flow.

advanced.label: Advanced
advanced.desc: Complex switches that affect coding / agent abilities, like subagent delegation. Off by default — enable with care.

safety.globalDesc: Tools are all available by default; write, Shell, and browser actions still require confirmation.

advanced.subagentDesc: Let characters split tasks among scout / worker / reviewer subagents to boost coding and multi-step abilities.
advanced.enableSubagentsDesc: Subagents run in separate processes; each of their tool calls is bound by the same safety guardrails as the main session. They need file-write / Shell permissions to be useful.
advanced.subagentHint: When on, a persistent session is used and delegation is allowed; risky subagent actions are still blocked. Only works with providers that support it natively (e.g. DeepSeek).
advanced.subagentBlocked: Subagents can't do anything right now: file-write and Shell are both off under Permissions, so they can only read, not change.
advanced.enableWriteShell: Enable write & Shell in one tap

model.tokenKeepPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep the saved token
model.savedNote: Saved — your next message will use the current model configuration.
model.saveFailed: Couldn't save. Please try again later.
model.unsavedNew: Save this new model first, or discard it before switching.
model.unsaved: Save the configuration first before switching or adding a model.
model.baseUrlNormalized: The Base URL contains a model name or /chat/completions; it will be changed to {{url}} when saving/testing.
model.noSavedToken: No configurations with a saved token yet.

web.canFallback: An explicit provider can fall back to Auto when a key is missing.
web.allowGeminiBrowserDesc: When on, it can read the local Chromium login state.
web.keyKeepPlaceholder: Saved {{status}} — leave blank to keep it

keyDesc.exa: With a key, uses the Exa API; without one, pi-web-access tries the Exa MCP fallback.
keyDesc.perplexity: Uses Perplexity Sonar search; requires an API key.
keyDesc.gemini: Can use a Gemini API key; or, with browser cookies allowed, your logged-in browser.

memory.longTermEmpty: {{label}} hasn't remembered anything about you yet — chat a bit more, or say hi when you first meet.
memory.recalledEmpty: Nothing recalled this round yet (happens when you send a message and the model retrieves memory).

read.label: Read file
read.desc: Read the contents of workspace files.

grep.label: Search text
grep.desc: Search for text within the workspace.

memory.read.label: Read memory
memory.read.desc: Recall user, character, and project memory.

web.fetch.label: Fetch web page
web.fetch.desc: Read the contents of a public URL.

browser.view.label: Browser view
browser.view.desc: Open a page and read its visible state.

browser.action.label: Browser action
browser.action.desc: Click, type, or submit on a page.
